tutorDocs.title: Documents (RAG)
tutorDocs.description: Upload apostolic PDFs so the AI tutor has context. Each document is split into chunks (~500 tokens/chunk) and embedded with Voyage voyage-3-large (1024-dim).
tutorDocs.uploadHint: Max 20 MB. Ingest can take 10-30 seconds depending on length.

pushTest.title: Push notification test
pushTest.description: Send a push notification to a specific student. Useful for testing the end-to-end flow without waiting for the weekly cron.
pushTest.note1: · The student must have enabled notifications from /configuracion beforehand.
pushTest.note2: · If they have several subscribed devices (laptop + phone), they receive it on all of them.
pushTest.note3: · Expired subscriptions (browser uninstalled the app) are cleaned up automatically.

admissions.title: Admissions
admissions.description: Review admission applications, approve or reject. The signed PDF letter is sent automatically 24h after approval.
admissions.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email or church

admissionDetail.networkNoLetter: Does not belong — pastor's letter required
admissionDetail.viewSignedLetter: View letter signed by the pastor
admissionDetail.consentLinkError: Could not generate the link (is the bucket configured?).

blocks.title: Blocks
blocks.footnote: Changes here are reflected on the public landing page (cards), on the block detail, in the student's /fases, and in the SEO/OG metadata. Both blocks and phases are updated in sync.

pastorBrief.section1Body: Greeting to the pastor, vision of the Kingdom moment, what DAP is and who it is for.
pastorBrief.section2Body: 18 months · 72 modules · 9 blocks · full list of the 9 dimensions (Disciple → Sent) + weekly Tuesday-Monday methodology.
pastorBrief.section3Title: What's included, investment and key dates
pastorBrief.section3Body: Value bullets, price $25 USD/month, 7-day guarantee, dates (enrollment Jun 01 · classes Jun 23), steps to enroll and Dr. Max's signature.
pastorBrief.title: Pastor brief
pastorBrief.description: 3-page PDF with all the DAP content — vision, structure, dimensions, methodology, investment and dates. Designed to send by email, WhatsApp or to print and hand out in meetings with pastors who are considering the program.
pastorBrief.fileMeta: 3 pages · DAP branding · Dr. Max's signature included
pastorBrief.note1Suffix: — edit it there if you need to change copy.
pastorBrief.note2Suffix: — if I move them, the brief updates on its own.
pastorBrief.note3: · The PDF is generated on-demand every time you click download — there's no cache.

community.title: Community
community.description: Moderate forum threads and reports. Pin official announcements, close exhausted conversations and hide inappropriate content.
community.reportsSummary: {count, plural, one {# pending review} other {# pending review}}

live.title: Live sessions
live.description: MasterClass, activations, mentorships and special events. After each session, upload the recording.

liveNew.title: New session
liveNew.description: Schedule a MasterClass, activation, group mentorship or special event. The recording is uploaded afterward.

excorrector.title: Dr. Max's voice
excorrector.description: This text is the system prompt that Claude receives every time it grades an assignment. Edit it to refine the tone, add examples of how you respond, or adjust the scoring rubric.
excorrector.note1: · Changes immediately affect the next grading triggered by the cron.
excorrector.note2: · If you leave the field empty, it reverts to the hardcoded voice manual in the repo.
excorrector.note3: · The text is sent as a system prompt to Claude — include examples, hard rules, and the scoring rubric.

phases.title: Phases
phases.description: The 9 phases of the diploma. Edit metadata, upload a cover and publish/unpublish.

phaseEdit.description: Edit the metadata. When you save, the landing page and the public phase page are revalidated.

phaseModules.title: Modules
phaseModules.description: {count} modules in this phase. Edit metadata or go into the 5 sections to populate content.

moduleEdit.title: Module {index}
moduleEdit.description: Edit the identity and apostolic content of the module.

moduleSections.title: Sections
moduleSections.description: The 5 fixed sections of the module. The teaching section includes a Mux video.

sectionEdit.title: Section {index}
sectionEdit.description: Edit the content of this section. Changes are immediate for students with access to the phase.
